name: /promote-standard rejects an unknown source identifier with an actionable error
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/promote-standard.sh" no-such-source 5.2.4 --snapshot /nonexistent 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'unknown_source' err.txt && grep -q 'no-such-source' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
